data.name: TNumericRange
data.content:
export type TNumericRange<
  From extends number,
  To extends number
> = Exclude<TEnumerate<To>, TEnumerate<From>>;

data.name: COR_BASE_COLOR_IDS
data.content: export const COR_BASE_COLOR_IDS: string[] = ['base-100', 'base-200', 'base-300', 'base-400', 'base-500', 'base-600', 'base-contrast', 'base-700', 'base-800', 'base-900'] as const;

data.name: COR_BOX_SHADOWS
data.content:
export const COR_BOX_SHADOWS: RCorBoxShadows = {
  "shadow-none": 'none',
  "shadow-xs": '0 0 0 1px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.05)',
  'shadow-sm': 'rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.16) 0px 1px 4px',
  'shadow': 'rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.12) 0px 1px 3px, rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.24) 0px 1px 2px',
  "shadow-md": 'rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.16) 0px 3px 6px, rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.23) 0px 3px 6px',
  "shadow-lg": "rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.19) 0px 10px 20px, rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.23) 0px 6px 6px",
  "shadow-ls": '0 20px 25px -5px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.1), 0 10px 10px -5px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.04)',
  "shadow-xl": '9px 9px 16px rgb(163, 177, 198, 0.6), -9px -9px 16px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-100), 0.5',
  "shadow-2xl": 'rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.25) 0px 14px 28px, rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.22) 0px 10px 10px',
  "shadow-inset-sm": 'inset 0 2px 4px 0 rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.06)',
  "shadow-inset": 'inset 4px 4px 10px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.12), inset -4px -4px 10px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-100), 0.65)',
  "shadow-inset-lg": 'inset 6px 6px 12px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.2), inset -6px -6px 12px var(--clr-base-100)',
  "shadow-retro": '8px 8px 0px 0px var(--clr-base-900)',
  "shadow-sharp": '4px 4px 0 rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.25)',
  "shadow-long": '10px 10px 0 rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.1)',
  "shadow-halo": '0 0 0 6px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.05), 0 0 0 12px rgba(var(--clr-base-raw-900), 0.03)',
};

  'primary-400', 'primary-500', 'primary-600', 'primary-contrast',

  'info-400', 'info-500', 'info-600', 'info-contrast',
  'light-400', 'light-500', 'light-600', 'light-contrast',
  'dark-400', 'dark-500', 'dark-600', 'dark-contrast',
] as const;
